title: Convert fragment-based window function to typed form
prompt: `MyApp.Blog.Rankings.posts_ranked_per_category/0` in `test_fixtures/fragment_window_fn.ex` uses a raw `fragment("row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY ? ORDER BY ? DESC)", ...)` to compute per-category ranks. Rewrite it using Ecto's typed form: `row_number() |> over(partition_by: p.category_id, order_by: [desc: p.inserted_at])`. No fragments. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/rankings.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing that Ecto has a typed WindowAPI — Claude defaults to the fragment form.
research_citation: Ecto.Query.WindowAPI hexdocs: 'The proper way to use row_number() with partition_by'
